original_abstract: Business ethics plays a key role in building strong, competitive companies through strategic planning, good organization, transparency in procedural systems, and a corporate culture supported by good and consistent ethics. This research was conducted using the direct observation method. With a sampling technique collected through interviews with several employees at PT. Nesia pan pacific clothing The results of this research show that good business ethics can improve the quality of employee work by creating a positive work environment and providing motivation. Ethical business practices include transparency, fairness, and social responsibility, which can create a sense of employee trust and loyalty. This can motivate them to work more efficiently and contribute positively to the overall quality of work.
humanized_abstract: In order to build and develop strong, competitive companies, there must be a system of planning, organization, transparent business processes, and a good culture of business ethics. This study used a direct observation method, by taking samples from interviews to some employees of PT. Nesia pan pacific clothing. The results show that good business ethics is one way to improve employee performance by creating a conducive working environment and stimulating factors, so that ethical conduct of a business is believed to be a factor that contains transparency, justice, and social responsibility, which ultimately give an effect of increasing employee trust and loyalty to the company. In order to give an impact to increasing employee performance to improve the quality of work results.
